Other: 1200: At Meridian the ship was put in commission Comdr Frank Wildes USN on the part of the Commandant of the Navy Yd turned the ship over to Charles Belknap Lieut YSN. The Ensign was hoisted at the peak and the commanding officers pennant at the mains. Lt Belknap read his orders from the Comdr of the Yard to assume command.
